title: premna glandulifera
intro: Premna glandulifera, also known as the glandular Premna, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Premna glandulifera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Premna glandulifera can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
